feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Concur
feed.subtitle: SAP Concur blog posts in SAP Community

entry.title: Virtual- Women in Data Science Silicon Valley @ SAP
entry.content:
We are excited to announce that this year's WiDS Silicon Valley @ SAP conference will be virtual and provide an opportunity for our larger community to attend. 

This conference aims to bring together Data Scientists, Data Engineers, Architects, Designers, Project Managers, and Students to join the conversation on how we can leverage Data Science to create a better world. After a year like 2020, where do we go from here?

This year we will focus on the future of Data Science under the theme "Data Science at the Cross Roads." We will do deep dives into the following topics: Model Development & Fundamentals, Production, Society, Ethics, and COVID-19

About WiDS

Stanford University's Women in Data Science (WiDS) initiative is on a mission to inspire and educate data scientists worldwide, regardless of gender, and to support women in the field and spotlight female data scientists working on innovative technology across business, academia, government, and nonprofits. 

WiDS Silicon Valley @ SAP is an independent event organized by SAP as part of the annual WiDS Worldwide conference organized by Stanford University and an estimated 150+ locations worldwide, which features outstanding women doing outstanding work in the field of data science. All genders are invited to attend all WiDS Worldwide conference events.

Agenda

We have a great agenda planned for you with representation from companies like Google, Accenture, Strava, IBM, SAP Concur, SAP Ariba, and SAP SuccessFactors, to mention a few. 


Join us to hear about the latest data science-related research and applications in several domains, and connect with others in the field. All genders are welcome and encouraged to attend.

 Find the schedule and list of speakers here

 Join us for this free event and register here

Thank you for reading, and have a wonderful day!

/ Jenny Lundberg

entry.title: Accelerate your cloud transformation with the video series on SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
This blog illustrates how the cloud journey with SAP Cloud ALM can be accelerated by watching our video series on the Services and Support YouTube channel.

When we kicked off the project, our goal was to ensure a flawless setup experience and to boost the end-user productivity. The video series should complement our already available assets on SAP Help Portal and SAP Support Portal.

With the video series, we provide an end-to-end experience by explaining how SAP Cloud ALM can be requested and how roles are assigned to users.

In addition, we detail, for instance, how to define the process scope and how to perform Fit-to-Standard workshops.

When you want to connect your cloud products, you may watch a how-to video about the setup for your selected scenario, for example, how to set up Business Process Monitoring for SAP SuccessFactors.

Behind the scenes:

The cross project team consisted of product owners / product management, user assistance developers, several video production experts, and myself.

Our target was to establish a harmonized user experience based on storyboards, which describe the individual steps, as a basis for the video recording.

The second step was to record a professional voiceover, which required more attention as expected. Therefore, we had to switch from an ordinary headset to appropriate equipment, such as a condenser microphone.

Finally, the raw material had to be put together during post production.

Especially at the beginning, when we were producing the first prototypes, a couple of iterations were needed until all good practices were established. This includes blurring real usernames, speaking slowly, and pausing briefly after each sentence.

 

Watch the videos!



Cross Topics Playlist:

Find out how to order and set up SAP Cloud ALM​.

 


Implementation Playlist:

Find out how to run implementation projects in SAP Cloud ALM.

 


Operations Playlist:

Find out how to set up, configure, and use SAP Cloud ALM for operations.

 

Increase your knowledge:


Follow these links to learn more about SAP Cloud ALM:

  • SAP Cloud ALM Home Page

  • SAP Cloud ALM for Implementation - Expert Portal

  • SAP Cloud ALM for Operations - Expert Portal


 

Thanks for visiting this blog. Please share your experiences by commenting or by contacting us at cloudalm@sap.com.

entry.title: Travel-to-Reimburse: Custom Field Mapping for the Concur Integration
entry.content:
One month has ended and a new one has begun. And an employee has submitted an expense report with expense entries splitting the two months. Now the reporting isn’t complete because you can’t split the expense report so that the entries are reported for the month that each expense was incurred.

Sound familiar?

With the SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2111 release, it’s become easier to enhance the posting logic for the Concur integration. Situations like the one described can be handled with the help of the Manage Concur Substitution Rules app.


Accessed with our standard business role, the app will guide you in creating your own substitution rule for expense reports at the item level for the following:

  • Assignment number

  • Business place

  • Functional area

  • Line item text

  • Reference keys

  • Service rendered date

  • Custom fields added in coding block (FINS_CODING_BLOCK) and/or journal entry item (FINS_JOURNAL_ENTRY_ITEM) business contexts


Depending on your use case, it may be possible to influence these fields by using the available substitution rules from Financials like the Substitution/Validation for Journal Entries app. But if you require data from a specific Concur field, then using the integration's substitution rules could be the best fit.

Once you’re in the app, you’ll first define the business context.


 

And then name your rule and provide a description.


With those taken care of, you’re ready to maintain the core parts of your rule: the precondition and the substitution.

The precondition lets you define when the rule should be executed. All transferred Concur fields are available for you to use and can be found using the value help (F4).

Do you need to enhance the posting logic only for expense reports submitted by employees who attended a conference? Then give the conference attendees a specific field, like Custom20 at the entry level, where they can enter the conference’s name when creating the expense report. For the rule's precondition, just select that exact same field as the Field and enter the conference’s name as the Value.



With the precondition maintained, it’s time to define the actual substitution. Choose the value help (F4) for your Target Field.


And select the field you need to substitute in the dialog box that appears.


Then determine how your rule should substitute the field and enter the Source based on your Substitution Type. Your Target Field can be substituted with a constant value, a value stored in another Concur field, or value from a table you created. Like with the precondition, all transferred Concur fields are available if you’re substituting with another field value.


If the native integration’s posting logic populates the Target Field, then you’ll need to select Overwrite so that the Target Field is populated with your chosen Source. Without Overwrite selected, the rule will only populate the Target Field if the standard posting logic doesn’t. Don’t forget – if the posting logic populates the Target Field or not can depend on your specific use case.

And with a quick save and activation of your rule, you can easily maintain fields that were once unavailable for the Concur integration.

 

Related Blog posts:

SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2111 Intelligent ERP Update

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Validation and Substitution rules

entry.title: Your Opportunity to Influence SAP – Customer Engagement Initiative Projects for Cycle 2-2022
entry.content:
An exciting opportunity to influence SAP has begun with the second cycle of the 2022 SAP Customer Engagement Initiative (CEI). The SAP Customer Engagement Initiative enables you as an SAP customer or partner, to get early insights into SAP’s product developments and directly work with the developers to define and shape future product directions.

We are offering several interesting opportunities for customers to influence SAP’s solutions.

The projects will be open for customer registration until July 8, 2022. Find here the list of all projects:

SAP S/4HANA & SAP S/4HANA Cloud

Enterprise Asset Management

  • Analyze Asset Maintenance Performance

  • Asset Strategy Implementation Workbench

  • Digital Thread Equipment Foundation

  • Methods to determine bad actor equipment

  • Multi ERP for SAP Asset Performance Management

  • Sound.AI: Predictive Maintenance of industrial equipment using airborne sound


Lifecycle Management

  • Building Intelligent Applications with intelligent scenario lifecycle management for SAP S/4HANA

  • How to operate customer-managed SAP S/4HANA systems on public cloud providers more efficiently

  • intelligent scenario lifecycle management for SAP S/4HANA


User Experience

  • Influence the evolution of SAP Fiori


ABAP

  • RAPtification of existing SAP GUI based applications


Business ByDesign

  • Crypto currencies and payments in SME

  • Impact of the Extended producer responsibility (EPR) regulations on SME markets

  • Skill Management for resource planning


Industry Solutions

  • AI Scenario Optimizer

  • Auto-completion of sales orders

  • Collaborative Management of Packaging Agreements and Data Sheets based on Packaging Standards

  • Customer Usage Use-Cases: What usage and experience information do you need?

  • Data Privacy by Design and Default: Your Obligation - Our Support

  • Improve your customer, employee, and partner experience with embedded Qualtrics use-cases

  • Improving the mobile experience for Finance Users

  • Innovative pay-per-use scenarios in SAP Subscription Billing

  • Managing product specifications for innovative and sustainable products

  • Mixed Reality Viewer for Digital Twins

  • "MyHome" - a strategic SAP project

  • Next-Gen SAP Retail Activity Optimization application

  • SAP Enterprise Product Development - Product as a Service

  • SAP Enterprise Product Development for discrete industry: Product Structure and Digital Thread

  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Sales Contract Integration

  • SAP Warehouse Operator

  • Simulations on demand in SAP Lifecycle Management

  • Streamline cross-enterprise provisioning and exchange of serial numbers

  • The Mobile Production Supervisor

  • XaaS Digital Assets


Finance & Risk

  • Organizational Flexibility in Finance: Profit Center and Segment Reorganizations

  • SAP Enterprise Service Management


SAP Business Technology Platform

  • Account Management on SAP Business Technology Platform with the btp CLI

  • Hands on Experience by testing out SAP Business Technology Platform use cases

  • No code process automation for citizen developers with SAP Process Automation

  • No-Code Application Development with SAP AppGyver

  • SAP Private Link service


 Data & Analytics

  • Dynamic extensions of analytical workloads to SAP HANA Cloud

  • SAP HANA Runtime License Audit & Measurement


 Blockchain

  • Reinvent Business Models and Processes with NFTs (Non-Fungible Token)


Spend Management

  • Concur Expense Delta Posting Feature (Phase 3)

  • Expense Type Administration for Concur Invoice

  • Funds and Grants Management in Concur Expense, integrated with ERP systems including SAP S/4HANA

  • Guided Sourcing: What's New & what's up next?

  • SAP S/4HANA Sourcing & Procurement: Manage Purchase Orders in the Professional Services Industry

  • Share your experience with SAP Concur Native Integration (ICS)


CRM & Customer Experience

  • Assisted Selling Module (ASM) for "Spartacus" / SAP Commerce Cloud

  • B2B features for "Spartacus" / SAP Commerce Cloud

  • Bundles for "Spartacus" / SAP Commerce Cloud

  • Buy online Pick up in store (BOPIS) for "Spartacus" / SAP Commerce Cloud

  • Content types management in SmartEdit / SAP Commerce Cloud

  • Feather by SAP for SAP Commerce Cloud

  • Improve Sales Effectiveness Through the Power of Feedback

  • Open Payment Framework (OPF) for SAP Commerce Cloud

  • Page Structure in SmartEdit / SAP Commerce Cloud

  • Social Commerce Facebook product feed integration for SAP Commerce Cloud

  • Storefront Hosting Service (SHS) for SAP Commerce Cloud

  • Spartacus Extensibility and Performance / SAP Commerce Cloud


Knowledge & Education

  • Course Accreditation Pilot

  • SAP Product Learning Advisory Panel


Mobile Experience across products

  • Mobile Solution for SAP Visual Inspection


SAP Globalization Services

  • Consistency checks within SAP Document and Reporting Compliance

  • E-HR (e-HCM for Kazakhstan)

  • Extensibility for SAP Document and Reporting Compliance in SAP S/4HANA Cloud

  • Handling of attachments with SAP Document and Reporting Compliance

  • Legal Change Notification as a Service on SAP for me

  • Localization Extensibility for SAP S/4HANA Cloud

  • Statutory reporting user experience enhancements for tax reporting personas

  • Sustainability reporting

  • Thailand e-Tax Invoice interface to Service Providers


SAP Enable Now

  • Role-based content delivery for SAP Enable Now

  • Web-based recording for SAP Enable Now


How do I register on the Customer Influence website? A short overview about how to find and register for a CEI project can be found on influence.sap.com.

Follow-up after registration: When you register for a project, you will be invited to an introductory call with the SAP project lead. At this point further participation is optional. Typically, all activities are governed by the Feedback Agreement with SAP.

Thank you in advance for your participation,

Customer Engagement Initiative Team

entry.title: SAP Activate & Concur
entry.content:
We are very pleased to bring you SAP Concur implementation content as an offering within the SAP Activate Roadmap Viewer under the Intelligent Enterprise implementation roadmap! Today, you can see the content which has been added (with content being added routinely).

The Intelligent Enterprise implementation roadmap in the SAP Activate Roadmap Viewer is a cross solution implementation roadmap which provides scope for specific cross solutions (also available within SAP Cloud ALM). Concur is now part of the Intelligent Enterprise implementation roadmap and the new content spans from the Prepare phase through the Run phase which covers a variety of scenarios and workstreams.

 


You can filter on the Concur specific content via our left-hand navigation options to yield all content pertaining to this solution.

  1. Click the "Content" tab

  2. Scroll down on the left-hand side of the filtering options to "More"

  3. Select "SAP Concur"



Filtering on the SAP Concur Content


 

The Concur content includes standard project milestones which you may be familiar with in many of our implementation roadmaps across the SAP Activate Roadmap Viewer offerings. Within the Concur filtered content, you can find the SAP S/4HANA Cloud and Concur integration for your implementation journey. Additionally, there are tailored tasks and milestones for Concur which includes content such as (but not limited to): getting started with your Concur implementation, system access, self-enablement, SAP S/4HANA Cloud and Concur integration scope items (1M1 and 4Q0), conducting a Concur fit-to-standard workshop, and data load preparation.

One accelerator which you will notice across the Concur tasks include the "SAP Concur Global Deployment Toolkit" which provides and supports the end-to-end content for the project team on a variety of topics to successfully deploy your Concur solution in conjunction with the content in the SAP Activate Roadmap Viewer. All of the solutions Concur offers (such as Travel & Expense, Invoice, and others) are all covered in detail within this accelerator as well as getting started, best practices, configuration and validation, and more which support the tasks you see in the Intelligent Enterprise implementation roadmap.


Accelerator: SAP Concur Deployment Toolkit


As new updates and content are available, you can find them incorporated into the Intelligent Enterprise implementation roadmap via the "SAP Concur" filter. We welcome any and all feedback on this solution addition to Intelligent Enterprise roadmap. You can provide feedback per our feedback tool via the steps below. We do review every item which is submitted via our feedback forms and include actionable items into our bi-weekly sprint process for updates.

  1. On the left-hand side of the SAP Activate Roadmap Viewer pages, click the "Feedback" box (as noted in the screenshot below)

  2. Fill out the "Give Feedback" pop up with your feedback

  3. Click "Send"



Submitting Concur Feedback for SAP Activate


 

We look forward to your feedback and additions to come for the Concur content, as they are available. To stay on top of the latest SAP Activate topics, including Concur content, please be sure to follow the SAP Activate Community topic page to stay up to date on all of the latest news and content! Thank you for reading this blog and let us know your thoughts in the comment section below.

 


 



Inside SAP S/4HANA Podcast

As always, I would like to encourage you to subscribe to our new podcast “Inside SAP S/4HANA.” This podcast leverages the unique knowledge and expertise of SAP S/4HANA product experts, partners and customers to address your needs by sharing product insights and project best practice. There is no customer success without product success and project success; we help you get to the next level and make your SAP S/4HANA projects a success. Subscribe now and benefit from the shared knowledge.

openSAP Microlearnings for SAP S/4HANA

Just a couple of months ago, we launched openSAP microlearnings for SAP S/4HANA as an exciting new learning opportunity. What began with a small batch of 20 videos, has now become a channel with more than 50 microlearnings that have generated over 20,000 views since then. Today we cover multiple lines of business, like Finance and Manufacturing & Supply Chain, and key technology topics like Master Data Management, Extensibility, User Experience, and Upgrade Management. We are continuously adding new microlearnings to the SAP S/4HANA channel, so make sure you check them out.

Your voice matters! 

If you want to learn more and actively engage with SAP subject matter experts on SAP S/4HANA Cloud, join our SAP S/4HANA Cloud Customer Community. This platform which is available to SAP S/4HANA Cloud customers and partners has a clear mission: deliver an interactive community to engage with one another about best practices and product solutions.

For more information on SAP S/4HANA Cloud, check out the following links:

  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud release info: http://www.sap.com/s4-cloudrelease

  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Release Blogs here

  • SAP S/4HANA PSCC Digital Enablement Wheel here



  • Inside SAP S/4HANA Podcast here

  • Product videos on our SAP S/4HANA Cloud and SAP S/4HANA YouTube playlist

  • Best practices for SAP S/4HANA Cloud here

  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Customer Community: register here

  • SAP Activate Community here



  • Feature Scope Description here

  • What’s New here

  • Help Portal Product Page here

  • Implementation Portal here


Follow us via @Sap and #SAPS4HANAValueSeries #SAPActivate

entry.title: OUT NOW: SAP Customer Engagement Initiative Projects for Cycle 3 - 2022
entry.content:
An exciting opportunity to influence SAP has begun with the third cycle of the 2022 SAP Customer Engagement Initiative (CEI). The SAP Customer Engagement Initiative enables you as an SAP customer or partner, to get early insights into SAP’s product developments and directly work with the developers to define and shape future product directions.

We are offering several interesting opportunities for customers to influence SAP’s solutions.

The projects will be open for customer registration until November 18, 2022. Find here the list of all projects:

SAP S/4HANA & SAP S/4HANA Cloud:

Enterprise Asset Management

  • Equipment Safety: Lockout Tagout Management

  • Long Term Asset and Budget Planning

  • Work Clearance Management for SAP Service and Asset Manager


Lifecycle Management

  • Business validation during SAP S/4HANA conversion projects using data transition validation - tool


User Experience

  • Manage Product Master Data - Redesign & Concepts

  • Redesign of the SAP FIORI-apps Manage Business Partner/Customer/Supplier Master Data

  • Renewal of User Experience for SAP Business One towards Cloud


Industry Solutions

  • Are you using documentation for multiple SAP products for one business use case?

  • Behavioral Insights and Machine Learning Concepts for Contract Accounting (FI-CA)

  • Business Decision Simulator swift decision making in times of uncertainty

  • Compliance Management with SAP S/4HANA Cloud

  • Innovative goods receipt process supported by mobile capabilities and smart desktop integration

  • Manage End-to-end lifecycle processes of metering installation

  • Manage Records Conditions Effectively

  • Price insight investigation in SAP S/4HANA Sales processes

  • Product Material Hierarchy in SAP S/4HANA

  • “ProcessOne”: The future of enterprise software is composable - How to make it a reality

  • Research for the Intelligent Warehouse

  • Reservation based Picking List in SAP S/4HANA - your feedback for MB26

  • Retelligence - The intelligent retail store management solution

  • SAP E-Mobility: Public APIs for CDR (Charging Data Record) and Driver App

  • SAP E-Mobility Roaming

  • Serial Number Management: Serial Number History Fiori App

  • Simplified Processes in Small- and Mid-Sized Warehouses

  • Support prepayment via digital payment method in SAP S/4HANA Sales processes

  • Sustainability in SAP S/4HANA Quote to Cash process

  • Visualization Workflow Automation for SAP Enterprise Product Development


SAP Business Technology Platform

  • Augmented Access Control - Access made simpler and more secure

  • Does the SAPUI5 Documentation Fulfill Your Documentation Requirements?

  • Empower business experts to citizen development by using SAP's no-code/low-code tools

  • Help Content for SAP Integration Suite

  • Integration of SAP BTP with SAP Cloud Identity Services: Custom Identity Providers

  • Monitoring and error handling in SAP S/4HANA and SAP S/4HANA Cloud

  • Runtime Strategy & Service Centricity

  • SAP Process Automation scheduling execution based on time-based and factory calendar triggers

  • SAP Process Automation triggering execution of processes/automations based on business events

  • SAP Task Center – handling all tasks in an harmonized and efficient way

  • User Research for No-Code Application Development with SAP AppGyver

  • User Research for SAP Process Automation


CRM & Customer Experience

  • Analytics for SAP Commerce Cloud

  • Core Search capabilities and extensibility mechanism for SAP Commerce Cloud

  • Data Driven Marketing with SAP Emarsys and SAP Customer Data Platform

  • Extend commerce cloud management API for customers

  • Integration between SAP Emarsys Customer Engagement and SAP Commerce Cloud

  • New "My Account" page for Spartacus / SAP Commerce Cloud

  • Partner Channel Management in SAP Sales and Service Cloud

  • Productivity browser extension for CX

  • SAP Customer Data Platform (CDP)

  • SAP Customer Experience: Web3 Customer Engagement (NFTs)

  • SAP Emarsys Account Engagement - Integration between

  • SAP Emarsys and SAP Sales Cloud

  • SAP Emarsys Customer Engagement: Your Analytics Use Cases

  • SAP Emarsys: Improvements of the mobile specific marketing channels

  • SAP Emarsys Customer Engagement: Editors for Email campaigns

  • SAP Emarsys Customer Engagement: Webchannel usage

  • Sustainability in Marketing with SAP Emarsys Customer Engagement


Innovation Center Network

  • Automation and Data Quality Management with SAP Master Data Governance on SAP S/4HANA

  • Continuous Intelligence - Autonomous Business Performance Monitoring in fast-moving Business Data

  • Video Data Stories: The Future Is Video - Next Generation Business Insights

  • Reinvent Business Models and Processes with Blockchain-Based Tokenization


SAP Globalization Services

  • Localization as a Self-Service for SAP S/4HANA Cloud

  • Localization of Statutory Reporting for UGPP

  • SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central integration with SAP ERP HCM Payroll

  • Test Automation of DMEE(X) and Related Tools


Data & Analytics

  • HANA Migration Service

  • The Evolution of SAP HANA Cloud Tooling for Administrators


Spend Management

  • Lean form for creating procurement suppliers

  • Procurement Planning for new (BOM based) Product Introductions

  • SAP Ariba Shopping

  • SAP Companion Custom Content for SAP Ariba Network

  • SAP Procurement Contracts integration with SAP Ariba connector for Icertis


SAP Concur

  • Concur Cost Object Approval Workflow API for use with external customer portals

  • Concur Expense - Collection of Receipts and other Supporting Documents for Expense Reports

  • Expense Type Administration for Concur Expense

  • Funds and Grants Integration from Concur Solutions into ERP systems including SAP S/4HANA

  • Integration between SAP Concur and QuickBooks

  • Integration between SAP Concur Request and all types of travel itinerary data

  • SAP Concur – Reporting – A New Service for Customers to Receive Concur Reporting Data


 SAP Enable Now

  • Mobile readiness for SAP Enable Now

  • SAP Enable Now: Customer Influence Requests Overview


Knowledge & Education

  • SAP Product Learning Advisory Panel


 ABAP Platform

  • Automation and Data Quality Management with SAP Master Data Governance on SAP S/4HANA


 Finance & Risk

  • SAP GRC Cloud: Platform Service Risk Survey


 Others

  • New Innovations for SAP Privacy Governance

  • Process performance evaluation with SAP Signavio Process Insights

  • SAP GRC Cloud: Platform Service Risk Survey

  • The future of enterprise software is composable - How to make it a reality

  • User Research: SAP Customer Social Media Engagement Questionnaire


How do I register on the Customer Influence website? A short overview about how to find and register for a CEI project can be found on influence.sap.com.

Follow-up after registration: When you register for a project, you will be invited to an introductory call with the SAP project lead. At this point further participation is optional. Typically, all activities are governed by the Feedback Agreement with SAP.

Thank you in advance for your participation,

Customer Engagement Initiative Team

entry.title: Come and join the latest SAP Customer Engagement Initiative Projects
entry.content:
It’s time again to connect our customers and partners with SAP Development Teams - the first cycle of the SAP Customer Engagement Initiative (CEI) in 2023 started today with 70+ new projects.

The SAP Customer Engagement Initiative enables you as an SAP customer or partner, to get early insights into SAP’s product developments and directly work with the developers to define and shape future product directions.

The projects will be open for customer registration until March 10. Find here the list of all projects:

SAP S/4HANA & SAP S/4HANA Cloud:

  • Create Situation Handling use cases to automatically alert users on urgent issues in SAP S/4HANA

  • Enabling Search and Accessibility of Customer-Defined Objects Using Custom Search Models

  • Fast implementation with pre-defined best-practice templates for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition

  • Integrating SAP Build Process Automation into the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Fiori User Interface

  • Intelligent KPI and Report creation

  • Planned App to Improve Implementation Process for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition

  • Planned app: Information Lifecycle Management (ILM) Advisor

  • Plug & Play connection for fast and guided 3rd party solutions for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition

  • SAP Enterprise Product Development - Configuration Management - Defining Next Steps

  • UI Level Data Masking in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition

  • What does composability mean for future enterprises and how would it look like in reality?


Industry Solutions

  • Analyzing Data Consistency for Industry Cloud Solutions

  • Data Extensibility for Industry Cloud Solutions

  • Data replication and data quality validation for Industry cloud solutions

  • Planned "Position Budgeting and Control" solution for SAP SuccessFactors

  • Planned Predictive Demand Planning Solution in Retail

  • Planned Redesign: Sales Order Fulfilment Monitor in SAP S/4HANA

  • SAP Cloud for Energy

  • SAP Intelligent Product Recommendation

  • SAP Predictive Replenishment - advanced capabilities


Supply Chain Management

  • Manage contractors in a crowd service platform within SAP Field Service Management

  • Outsourced manufacturing for high tech and discrete industries

  • SAP Field Service Management - Service Map

  • SAP Service and Asset Manager - Creating the optimal Mobile Experience


SAP Business Technology Platform

  • Auth-X: Consistent, Context-aware, dynamic authorizations for hybrid IT landscapes

  • Blockchain, Web3 and No-Code Services for Automated Cross-Company Collaboration

  • Decentralized Network Enablement or How to join dataspaces

  • Document Printing with Anonymization as a Service Enabled

  • Implementing low-code development with SAP Build

  • Improving the customer experience utilizing SAP Business Technology Platform

  • Migration to SAP HANA Cloud

  • Monitoring of customer applications built with SAP Business Technology Platform

  • SAP Integration Suite - Onboarding User Research

  • SAP Responsibility Management Service in SAP Business Technology Platform

  • Simplify API consumption and Cross Integrations in SAP Build via Actions

  • Simplifying our Identity Access Management in the Intelligent Enterprise - but what do you think?

  • The SAP Discovery Center - Your Opportunity to Stand Out


CRM & Customer Experience

  • Analytics Vision for SAP Emarsys Customer Engagement

  • Cross-channel use cases for Intelligent Selling Services for SAP Commerce Cloud

  • Enterprise-level outbound data connection

  • Recommerce for SAP Commerce Cloud

  • SAP Emarsys Account Engagement - Integration between SAP Emarsys and SAP Sales Cloud

  • SAP Sales & Service Cloud Integration

  • Smart search capabilities for Search Service for SAP Commerce Cloud


Innovation Center Network

  • Augmented Access Control - Access made simpler and more secure

  • Business Decision Simulator - swift decision making in times of uncertainty

  • Composable Process Platform - The future of business processes


SAP Globalization Services

  • Australia: Single Touch Payroll Phase 2 Concurrent Employment Reporting

  • Brazil: Accounting for Credit control for PIS/COFINS taxes on Assets

  • Direct Debit Payments outside SEPA

  • India GST reporting through DRC Reporting framework

  • Inflation Management for Fixed Assets

  • Localization as a Self-Service for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition

  • Partner Training for DRC Extensibility in SAP S/4HANA Cloud

  • User Interface for Document Translation (Translation Portal)


 Spend Management

  • Application embedded data insights and recommended actions cards for SAP's Procurement Solutions

  • Intelligent Opportunity Analyzer for SAP's Procurement Solutions

  • N-tier batch traceability in SAP Business Network for Supply Chain

  • SAP Business Network integration with MS-Teams

  • Supply Chain Fulfillment integration: Buyer Managed Logistics Service Provider Enablement


SAP Concur

  • Concur Expense – NextGen UI for Expense Approvers

  • Concur Expense and QuickBooks Integration

  • Concur Travel - Evolution of Travel - Configuration and Administration

  • Concur Travel – Hotel Shop Evolution

  • Concur Travel, Expense, and Request Integration Evolution

  • SAP Concur - Mobile UX Feature Enhancement Feedback

  • SAP Concur Solutions - Data Retention and Data Protection and Privacy policy within product

  • SAP Concur Solutions - Managed Integration Service for NetSuite Connector

  • SAP Concur Solutions - Salesforce Connector Feature Enhancements

  • SAP Concur Solutions - Sustainability Evolution


 Others

  • Planned New Interface for SAP Companion


Visit the Customer Influence website on influence.sap.com to register.

Follow-up after registration: When you register for a project, you will be invited to an introductory call with the SAP project lead. At this point further participation is optional. Typically, all activities are governed by the Feedback Agreement with SAP.

Thank you in advance for your participation,

Customer Engagement Initiative Team

entry.title: Come and join the latest Customer Engagement Initiative Projects
entry.content:
The second cycle of the SAP Customer Engagement Initiative (CEI) in 2023 started today with 49 new projects - so it's about time again to connect our customers and partners with SAP Development Teams.

The SAP Customer Engagement Initiative enables you as an SAP customer or partner, to get early insights into SAP’s product developments and directly work with the developers to define and shape future product directions.

The projects will be open for customer registration until June 16. Find here the list of all projects:

SAP S/4HANA & SAP S/4HANA Cloud

  • Audit report for Access Risk

  • Cross-Border Payments with Digital Money

  • Customer Data Browser

  • Green Ledger - Reach Your Climate Goals by Carbon Accounting

  • Ideation: Use Cases for Intelligent Automation of Processes in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition

  • Identify use cases and integration points for mobile AI-based anti-counterfeiting technology

  • Integrating SAP Teamcenter by Siemens, CALM foundation with SAP S/4HANA Enterprise Asset Management

  • Intelligent Access Risk Mitigation Process

  • Report Scheduling and Broadcasting


Industry Solutions

  • Automotive Digital Twin with SAP Digital Vehicle Hub

  • Battery Passport Management

  • Direct Distribution Mobile for Van Sales


Supply Chain Management

  • Asset Administration Shell (AAS) Digital Twins along the supply chain

  • Batch Management – Batch Overview Page with Graphical Display

  • SAP Digital Manufacturing for Circular Production and Recycling

  • SAP Integrated Business Planning (IBP) integration to SAP S/4HANA, public cloud

  • Transfer supply planning decisions & constraints from SAP IBP to PP/DS in SAP S/4HANA


SAP Business Technology Platform

  • Enabling no code process automation for citizen developers with SAP Build Process Automation

  • Evaluating the user experience for integration content in the SAP Integration Suite’

  • Improving the Open Documentation Initiative

  • SAP Content Agent service integrated with SAP Cloud Transport Management service

  • SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh as part of SAP's Event Driven Ecosystem

  • Shape the User Experience of SAP Task Center

  • Validation of Design Concept for SAP BTP administrative tasks


CRM & Customer Experience

  • Composable Storefront for SAP Commerce Cloud - SDK and BFF for frontend solutions

  • Delivery Mode & Costs for SAP Commerce Cloud

  • SAP Commerce Cloud - Data Privacy Management

  • SAP Retail Execution Mobile App


Innovation Center Network

  • Automating Business Processes by Citizen Developers - No Coding Skills Needed (Usability Research)

  • SAP Blockchain Business Connector: Innovation in Business Models and Cross-Company Collaborations


SAP Globalization Services

  • Austrian Payroll: Automatic derivation of data for Work and Remuneration Confirmation A

  • BRS Changes for South Africa

  • China Legal Change: Audit Data Reports with SAP Document and Reporting Compliance

  • CO2-Emissions Reporting

  • Localization as a Self-Service for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition

  • Singapore GST Return Online Submission with SAP Document and Reporting Compliance

  • Singapore IRAS for SAP Document and Reporting Compliance integration

  • Social Media Integration with SAP S/4HANA

  • Tax Register for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition


Spend Management

  • New Supplier Discovery Experience for Guided Sourcing Capability for SAP Ariba Sourcing

  • New User Experience for SAP Procurement Purchasing Processes


SAP Concur

  • Concur Request – Approvals and Changes Innovation

  • Concur Travel – Travel Policy Rules Configuration

  • SAP Concur Solutions and SAP Fieldglass Integration

  • SAP Concur Solutions – Data Reporting Offerings

  • SAP Concur Solutions – Homepage, Profile UI, and Notification Preferences Modernization


Others

  • Configuration of SAP Cloud ALM for Operations

  • Screenshots – Yay or Nay?


Visit the Customer Influence website on influence.sap.com to register.

Follow-up after registration: When you register for a project, you will be invited to an introductory call with the SAP project lead. At this point further participation is optional. Typically, all activities are governed by the Feedback Agreement with SAP.

Thank you in advance for your participation,

Customer Engagement Initiative Team

entry.title: It’s time again to participate in SAP Customer Engagement Initiative Projects
entry.content:
This is your chance as customers and partners to connect with SAP Development Teams - the third cycle of the SAP Customer Engagement Initiative (CEI) in 2023 started today with 60 new projects.

The SAP Customer Engagement Initiative enables you as an SAP customer or partner, to get early insights into SAP’s product developments and directly work with the developers and product management to define and shape future product directions.

The projects will be open for customer registration until November 10, 2023. Find the list of all projects here:

SAP S/4HANA & SAP S/4HANA Cloud

  • Centralised Test Data Management Tool for Test Automation Tool

  • Developer Extensibility artifacts on SAP Business Accelerator Hub

  • Enhance user experience and functionality of the production routing application

  • Innovation project regulatory intelligence for SAP GRC

  • Intelligent Forecasting

  • Introduce and validate refurbishment process for assets in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition

  • Manage Business Test Data - Decentralized Approach

  • Mobile Experience for Core Inventory Management

  • Public Sector: Explore Generative AI use cases

  • Realize your Business Challenges through Extensibility in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition

  • Research on Next generation Public Cloud ERP for Small Business and Lower Midmarket

  • SAP Responsibility Management Service in SAP Business Technology Platform

  • SAP S/4HANA Document Management Integration with Google Workspace

  • 'TaxSavvyBot': GenAI-Powered Withholding Tax Configuration Assistant

  • UI modernization in SAP S/4HANA Business Partner SAP Fiori Apps

  • Validate new standard SAP Fiori app to manage maintenance task lists

  • Validate SAP Fiori app for maintenance technicians to record maintenance tasks and relevant data


Industry Solutions

  • EU Regulation Battery Passport

  • Next Gen Vehicle Sales Management

  • SAP Retail Execution Mobile App


Supply Chain Management

  • SAP Cloud Integration between SAP IBP and SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition

  • SAP ECC: Transportation processes with a low to medium complexity

  • SAP Serialization Cloud Repository (SAP Advanced Track & Trace for Pharmaceuticals on SAP S/4HANA)

  • Sustainable manufacturing using SAP Enterprise Product Development - "intelligent handover"


SAP Business Technology Platform

  • New service for hosting and serving frontend applications

  • SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry Runtime

  • SAP Business Technology Platform - Information Lifecycle Management

  • SAP Business Technology Platform: Business Agent Builder - Revolutionize AI agents

  • SAP PrivateLink service

  • Transform business processes with SAP Build Process Automation: tailor notifications your own way


CRM & Customer Experience

  • 2211 Continuous Innovation for SAP Commerce Cloud

  • Customer Data Cloud Orchestrate UX Unification

  • Customer Managed Keys for SAP Commerce Cloud

  • SAP Field Service Management - Semi-/fully automated planning capabilities on the planning board

  • SAP Retail Execution Mobile App


AI

  • The Industrial Metaverse - NextGen business collaboration


ABAP

  • Business Configuration Change Logs in SAP S/4HANA


Lifecycle Management

  • Continuous Integration and Delivery with ABAP and gCTS

  • Investigation into SAP Automation Pilot - GenAI Assistant for DevOps commands

  • Simplified SAP Notes Identification and Implementation using Revamped Note Assistant (SNOTE)


Data & Analytics

  • Business Decision Simulator - Simulate and predict the unforeseeable

  • Monitoring Cost Consumption in SAP HANA Cloud

  • SAP Analytics Cloud in MS Powerpoint

  • Simulation with SAP Analytics Cloud


SAP Database & Data Management

  • Hybrid Development for SAP HANA on-premise and SAP HANA Cloud


User Assistance

  • Help Where and When You Need It: User Assistance in SAP S/4HANA Cloud

  • SAP Enable Now: Responsiveness of book pages


Innovation Center Network

  • Beyond Blockchain - Streamlining Compliance & enhancing efficiency with a Shared Ledger on SAP HANA

  • Blockchain Business Connector: Pioneering Business Models and NextGen Collaboration with SAP BTP

  • Decentralized Process Automation for the Future of Business Collaboration

  • Shared Ledger on SAP HANA – Addressing VAT Challenges in Tax Administration and E-Invoicing


SAP Globalization Services

  • Localization as a Self-Service for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition


SAP Concur

  • SAP Concur - Invoice NextGen – Purchase Order Import - Matching and Allocations

  • SAP Concur - Pre-approved card spend with enhanced compliance

  • SAP Concur - Pre-Submit AI Compliance for Verify

  • SAP Concur - Request - Cascading Request Scenarios / Group Request

  • SAP Concur Travel - AI Assistant Feedback

  • SAP Concur Travel - Payments Administration & Rules Administration

  • SAP Concur Travel - Travel Policy Rules Configuration

  • SAP Concur Travel Extensibility


Others

  • EU Regulation Battery Passport


Visit the Customer Influence website on influence.sap.com to register.

Follow-up after registration: When you register for a project, you will be invited to an introductory call with the SAP project lead. At this point further participation is optional. Typically, all activities are governed by the Feedback Agreement with SAP.

Thank you in advance for your participation,

Your SAP Customer Engagement Initiative Team

entry.title: Where can I get started with Concur Expense learning?
entry.content:
You can build the skills you need, for free and at your own pace with our Digital Learning Journey. 
on  our SAP Learning Site

Access our Getting Started with Concur Expense Learning Journey for Customer Users learning journey  

Overview
This learning journey with demos and practice simulations will introduce business users to the basics of Concur Expense such as profile features, creating a new expense report, the expense report approval process and roles, as well as additional expense report features needed to be successful in submitting their expense reports.

Learning objectives

  • Explain an overview of SAP Concur and how to do basic tasks (signing in, profile, home page).
  • Set Up Your Concur Expense Profile.
  • Create a New Expense Report and basic expense line items.
  • Explain What Happens Once You Submit your Expense Report.
  • Set up Additional Expense Report Features.

Pass all the quizzes and receive a digital badge

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area
Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you.

We appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Out now: Register for the latest SAP Customer Engagement Initiative Projects until March 08, 2024
entry.content:
It’s time again to connect our customers and partners with SAP Development Teams - the first cycle of the SAP Customer Engagement Initiative (CEI) in 2024 started today with 37 new projects.

The SAP Customer Engagement Initiative enables you as an SAP customer or partner, to get early insights into SAP’s product developments and directly work with the developers to define and shape future product directions. By that we can create solutions that better meet your and other customers’ needs, leveraging process and technology innovations.

The projects will be open for customer registration until March 08, 2024. Find here the list of all projects:

SAP S/4HANA & SAP S/4HANA Cloud

  • GenAI for Situation Handling
  • Integration of SAP Financial Compliance Management with SAP Identity Access Governance
  • Intelligent Closing in the Public Cloud ERP
  • Leveraging Generative AI capabilities in Business Partner Master data
  • Planned New Cost Center Reporting with Review Booklets in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
  • Qualitative risk assessment methodology in SAP Financial Compliance Management

Supply Chain Management

  • Advanced Planning and Scheduling (PP/DS) in SAP S/4HANA
  • Business AI in Asset Performance Management
  • Planned SAP BTP Service for Dynamic Forms
  • SAP PLM - Change Management for SAP EPD
  • SAP Service and Asset Management - Safety Technician Persona(WCM)

SAP Business Technology Platform

  • Create your extensions with SAP Build and SAP Build Code
  • Evaluating Solution Ideas for an Improved Admin Experience on SAP BTP
  • Hybrid integration with SAP Integration Suite
  • Learning from customers about their NEO migration journey and needs for user assistance
  • SAP Discovery Center Innovation – simplify the experience for technical users on the SAP BTP
  • Templates for No-Code Application Development with SAP Build Apps

Innovation Center Network

  • AI Business Agents with SAP BTP: An Exploration Project
  • HANA Ledger (private BETA): Enhancing Compliance and Traceability in Business Processes with BTP

SAP Globalization Services

  • Implementation of Hijri calendar in HR procedures per civil service law
  • Localization as a Self-Service for SAP S/4HANA Public Edition
  • Pilot customers for DMEE to DMEEX migration
  • WHT Integration of WHT FICA model with FI

SAP Concur

  • SAP Concur - Multi Factor Authentication (MFA) enhancements / Authentication feature enhancements
  • SAP Concur Expense - Streamlining Report Updates for ERP Integration with Concur Expense
  • SAP Concur Expense and ICS - Processing Cash Advance Returns as part of ICS
  • SAP Concur Travel - Research into "Car Shop" in Evolution of Travel
  • SAP Concur Travel - Evolution of Travel - Airline Ticketing Fees
  • SAP Concur Travel - Evolution of Travel - Planned New Trip Shopping / Booking Experience
  • TripIt from SAP Concur - Single Sign On

AI

  • Smart Data Load - AI Supported Chart of Accounts Mapping

Data & Analytics

  • Migration to SAP HANA Cloud

Lifecycle Management

  • AI & GenAi Integration with Intelligent Scenario Lifecycle Management
  • Planned Enhancements to Maintenance Planner

SAP Learning

  • Customer Feedback Program for Learning SAP: discuss how to best listen to customers & partners
  • Learning SAP: let’s innovate together

Others

  • SAP Reference Architecture in SAP LeanIX

Visit the Customer Influence website on influence.sap.com to register.

Follow-up after registration: When you register for a project, you will be invited to an introductory call with the SAP project lead. At this point further participation is optional. Typically, all activities are governed by the Feedback Agreement with SAP.

Thank you in advance for your participation,

Customer Engagement Initiative Team

entry.title: Your voice matters! Your benefits of the SAP User Research Panel
entry.content:
We’d love to hear your feedback on the SAP products you use every day.

Join a user research session so you can influence product update decisions, and SAP can keep providing you with products that fit your needs.

The SAP User Research Panel at its presentation at SAP TechEd in Bangalore in November 2023.
The SAP User Research Panel is SAP’s new core ingredient for user research. SAP users can now express their interest in participating in research sessions via a new database to take part in selected studies. Daily workflows and business processes can then be simplified and improved in direct collaboration with SAP’s product teams. Ina Prügel, project manager for the SAP User Research Panel, answers three questions about the benefits of the panel for users and why the panel is a gamechanger in UX for SAP.

Ina PrügelIna, tell us about the reasoning behind the panel.

User research is an essential part of product design and development at SAP. Our teams of product managers, developers, designers, and researchers had been organizing usability testing at events for a couple of years, for example at SAP TechEd and Sapphire. At first, virtual recruiting and testing was a temporary solution during the Covid-19 lockdown. And now we have a way to provide vital user feedback throughout the product lifecycle. With efficient tools at hand, virtual research is highly sustainable regarding travel, availability, and time. Our product teams also expressed their wish to have a participant panel so that SAP users can be included in the design and development journey of SAP products.

What benefits does the panel bring to SAP users?

The panel allows us to bring together SAP users and SAP product teams in selected studies to gain valuable insights to help improve the user experience. SAP users from all around the globe and from a diverse range of experiences and perspectives can sign up and share their insights. Together, we can bridge gaps in product processes and identify new opportunities to improve the user experience.

We are particularly interested to invite users across our product portfolio and services to join the panel: from SAP Business Technology Platform and SAP S/4HANA Cloud over solutions by SAP Build, SAP Signavio or SAP SuccessFactors, SAP Concur to SAP Ariba, SAP Business Network, and more.

When was the panel launched and how can SAP users get involved?

We initially presented the panel at the DSAG annual congress in Bremen last September. This was followed by activities at SAP TechEd in Bangalore in November 2023 and at customer and partner events in Paris, San Antonio, London, Hamburg, and St. Leon-Rot.

The SAP User Research Panel launched at the DSAG Annual Congress 2023 in Bremen.It was great to collect first feedback and to be affirmed that we are not only meeting the needs of our researchers and product teams with the panel, but also of our users and customers. They expressed their excitement, stating that the panel would be a great opportunity to be closer to product teams and to give more direct feedback. In parallel, researchers have launched first research studies with our new research participants.

We’ve already had great sign-up numbers to the SAP User Research Panel, but to cover research activities across all of SAP on a regular basis, we are hoping many more SAP users will sign up for this exciting opportunity.  

Panel participation in a nutshell

If you are an SAP user, join our panel to actively influence your user experiences for both unreleased and existing products and solutions. SAP users of all expertise levels, backgrounds, and continents are welcome.

Possible formats are one-on-one interviews, surveys, and unmoderated tests. There is no obligation to participate if contacted.

Click here for sign-up.

More information about the panel is available on the official website.

We’re excited to hear from you at userresearch_panel_support@sap.com if you have any questions.

entry.title: Invitation to join a test event for SAP Concur integration into SAP Funds and Grants Management
entry.content:
We recently released functionality that enables direct cost control between SAP Concur and SAP Financials Public Sector management. This functionality enables funds checking ("Do we have funds available?"), and funds reservations ("Reserve these funds for this traveler/spend"). Read more about it in this blog.

What is a test event?

A test event is an opportunity to get first hand experience with newly released or upcoming functionality. Through your testing, you can experiment with the functionality on familiar business processes, while having direct access to experts. You'll have the opportunity to share feedback and help shape our understanding of your needs. 

You'll bring your processes around budget control and funds reservations (also known as encumbrances, obligations, commitments, earmarking, etc), and we'll help you set up in our test environments. 

The test environments include access to Concur and SAP Financials.

Who can participate?

To ensure we can support all participants throughout the process, we have a limited number of spots available. Participants should be familiar with all of the following:

  • SAP Concur Expense
  • SAP Concur Request (optional)
  • SAP S/4 HANA Financials Public Sector Management

Participants will need to dedicate time to the event, participating in testing activities, kickoffs, and feedback sessions. 

Both partners and customers are invited participate.

When is the event?

The event is scheduled to occur April 23, 2024 through April 25, 2024 between the hours of 9 AM and 6 PM Central European Time. 

Registration will close March 4, 2024.

Where is the event?

This is a virtual event, so participants will be remote. The event will be facilitated by teams in Germany, so it will be held in Central European Time working hours.

What should I expect at the event?

Details will be shared with participants. High level plan is as follows:

  • Day 1:
    • Kickoff with guided demo of the product
    • Participants will be guided through access to the test environments
    • All day testing with open lines to Product, Engineering, and SME teams 
    • Closing feedback session
  • Day 2:
    • Daily kickoff with Q&A
    • All day testing with open lines to Product, Engineering, and SME teams 
    • Closing feedback session
  • Day 3:
    • Daily kickoff with Q&A
    • All day testing with open lines to Product, Engineering, and SME teams 
    • Closing feedback session

How can I register interest?

If you are interested in participating, please send an email with subject "I want to register for PSM Test" to: sapconcurintegration@sap.com and someone will be in touch to get more information.

entry.title: Open for Registration: SAP Customer Engagement Initiative Projects for SAP Concur
entry.content:
Connect financial data and take control of spending! By automating spending processes your business can run efficiently anywhere, anytime, and under any circumstances.

  • Concur Expense: Automate expense management and take control of spending, no matter where it happens.
  • Concur Invoice: Automate AP management to be more efficient, increase profitability, and get more visibility into spending.
  • Concur Travel: Simplify travel management and let employees book business travel on their own, at the best rates, and within spending policies.

New projects around SAP Concur are open for registration. Scroll through the list of SAP Customer Engagement Initiative projects for SAP Concur and get informed about the planned new features and functions.

Don’t forget to register for one of the projects until March 08, 2024

SAP Concur Solutions projects for registration:

  • SAP Concur - Multi Factor Authentication (MFA) enhancements / Authentication feature enhancements 
  • SAP Concur Expense - Streamlining Report Updates for ERP Integration with Concur Expense 
  • SAP Concur Expense and ICS - Processing Cash Advance Returns as part of ICS 
  • SAP Concur Travel - Research into "Car Shop" in Evolution of Travel 
  • SAP Concur Travel - Evolution of Travel - Airline Ticketing Fees
  • SAP Concur Travel - Evolution of Travel - Planned New Trip Shopping / Booking Experience 
  • TripIt from SAP Concur - Single Sign On 

Visit the Customer Influence website on influence.sap.com to register.

What’s next after registration? When you register for a project, you will be invited to an introductory call with the SAP project lead. You can then decide if you want to actively participate. Typically, all activities are governed by the Feedback Agreement with SAP.

If you are also interested in other CEI projects that are currently open for registration, see the full list here.

Thank you in advance for your participation!
